calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Off Calendar

Application For Prove-Up Hearing And Judgment Quieting Title And Establishing Title To Real Property Pursuant To Destroyed Land Records Relief Law
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Richard Wallace, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, VP DUBOCE TRIANGLE LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY,
No appearance by defaulted defendants ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THE COMPLAINT ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFF'S TITLE, OR ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFF'S TITLE THERETO, and ALL PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY INTEREST IN, OR LIEN UPON, THE REAL PROPERTY HEREIN DESCRIBED, OR ANY PART THEREOF,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witnesses: Ben Ron and Don Bragg sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED, AND DECREED THAT:
1. As of April 1, 2016, Plaintiff is the sole owner in fee simple absolute of the "Gap Property" situated within the property located at 2238-2254 Market Street and 2153-2157 15th Street, San Francisco, California (Assessor Lots 005, 006, 007, 008, 025, and Lot 026 of Block 3560) that is not included in the recorded legal description of the property. The Gap Property is more particularly described as follows:

ALL THAT REAL PROPERTY SITUATED IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, DESCRIBED AS FOLLOWS:

BEGINNING AT A POINT ON THE NORTHWESTERLY LINE OF MARKET STREET (120.00 FEET WIDE), DISTANT THEREON 360.00 FEET NORTHEASTERLY FROM THE EASTERLY LINE OF NOE STREET (82.50 FEET WIDE); THENCE NORTHEASTERLY ALONG SAID LINE OF MARKET STREET 0.01 FEET TO A POINT DISTANT THEREON 340.00 FEET SOUTHWESTERLY FROM THE SOUTHERLY LINE OF 15th STREET (64.00 FEET WIDE); THENCE NORTHWESTERLY AT A RIGHT ANGLE FROM SAID NORTHWESTERLY LINE OF MARKET STREET 115.00 FEET;

THENCE AT A RIGHT ANGLE NORTHEASTERLY 1.41 FEET TO A LINE THAT IS PARALLEL WITH AND PERPENDICULARLY DISTANT 200.00 FEET EASTERLY FROM SAID EASTERLY LINE OF NOE STREET; THENCE NORTHERLY ALONG SAID LINE 7.60 FEET TO A POINT THAT IS PERPENDICULARLY DISTANT 125.00 FEET SOUTHERLY FROM SAID SOUTHERLY LINE OF 15th STREET; THENCE SOUTHERLY 8.59 FEET TO A POINT THAT IS ON A LINE THAT IS AT A RIGHT ANGLE FROM SAID NORTHWESTERLY LINE OF MARKET STREET THROUGH THE POINT OF BEGINNING, SAID POINT BEING DISTANT ALONG SAID LINE 115.00 FEET NORTHWESTERLY FROM THE POINT OF BEGINNING; THENCE SOUTHEASTERLY ALONG SAID LINE 115.00 FEET TO THE POINT OF BEGINNING.

BEING A PORTION OF MISSION BLOCK NO. 102.

ALSO BEING A PORTION OF ASSESSOR'S BLOCK NO. 3560

2. Plaintiff's title in the Gap Property is established and quieted in rem against all the world. No other person or entity other than Plaintiff has any claim, right, title, interest, or lien whatsoever in or to the Gap Property, or any part thereof, except for such interests pursuant to documents recorded in the Public Records of the City and County of San Francisco, California.
3. All persons and entities, except those with interests in the Gap Property pursuant to documents recorded in the Public Records of the City and County of San Francisco, California, are forever restrained and enjoined from claiming, or in any manner asserting, any claim, right, title, interest, or lien, in or to the Gap Property or any part thereof, adversely to Plaintiff.

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-17-2016 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
